query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_vocus_services,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN contractEndDate IS NOT NULL AND contractEndDate != '' THEN 1 END) as with_contract_end,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN discoveryNotes LIKE '%Vocus Services Import%' THEN 1 END) as with_vocus_notes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN connectionId LIKE 'VBU%' THEN 1 END) as internet_services
FROM services 
WHERE supplier = 'Vocus';
